event: Pastoral Scene at the Farm in Saint Simeon
description: A rural landscape depicting a farm scene. Cows graze in the middle ground among low bushes and grassy fields. A haystack sits at right. Tall mature trees with full canopies dominate the right side of the composition, silhouetted against a grey-blue sky. At left, the ground slopes away toward a distant view with what appears to be water or misty lowlands. The palette is muted with greens, browns, and grey overcast tones, creating a quiet pastoral atmosphere.
